FAQ.subtitle: FAQ
FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know about Axiom.

items.a: Axiom is an AI-powered study companion. Upload a photo or type a question to get step-by-step solutions, write essays, humanize AI text, or learn any subject with an interactive tutor.
Yes! The Free plan gives you 3 solves per day, 1 essay, and 500 words of humanization. Upgrade to Pro ($19/mo) or Elite ($49/mo) for higher limits and premium features.
Axiom handles math, physics, chemistry, biology, history, literature, programming, and more. If you can ask it, Axiom can solve it.

items.q: How does the Solve feature work?
items.a: Snap a photo of your homework or type a question. Axiom uses AI to analyze it and returns a detailed, step-by-step solution in about 5 seconds.
Humanize takes AI-generated text and rewrites it to sound natural and human. Choose from Academic, Casual, or Professional modes.
Absolutely. You can cancel anytime from Settings → Manage Subscription. Your plan stays active until the end of the billing period.
Yes. We use Supabase with row-level security, HTTPS encryption, and never share your data with third parties. You can delete your account and all data from Settings at any time.
The interface is available in English, Portuguese, Spanish, French, German, and Chinese. AI responses adapt to your selected language.

features.title: Everything a student actually needs
features.subtitle: Not another tool. The tool that replaces them all.
features.solvePain: "I've been staring at this problem for 20 minutes and I don't even understand the question."
features.solveDesc: Snap a photo or type the question. Full step-by-step solution in seconds. Ask follow-ups, get alternative methods, generate practice questions.
features.solveAnticipation: → Imagine snapping a photo and it's done before you exhale.
features.learnPain: "It's midnight. Exam tomorrow. I haven't studied a single page. I'm done."
features.learnDesc: Type the subject → get a 1-page summary, 10 exam questions with answers, flashcards, and a 2-hour study plan. One click.
features.learnAnticipation: → Imagine opening the app at 2am and feeling calm in 60 seconds.
features.writePain: "1,500 words with APA citations by Friday. I have zero ideas and a blank page."
features.writeDesc: Outline → draft → citations → polish. AI-powered essay writer with academic tone, proper references, and publication-ready structure.
features.writeAnticipation: → Imagine going from blank page to finished essay in 15 minutes.
features.humanizePain: "My professor runs everything through AI detectors. If I submit this, I'm caught."
features.humanizeDesc: Paste any AI-generated text → get natural, human-sounding output. Three modes: Academic, Casual, Professional. Passes every detector.
features.humanizeAnticipation: → Imagine hitting submit with zero anxiety.

testimonials.title: They were skeptical too
testimonials.subtitle: Until they tried it once.
testimonials.quote1: I had a Calculus exam in 6 hours and hadn't studied at all. Used Panic Mode and got a summary + practice questions. Passed with a B+. I'm not kidding.
testimonials.quote2: I was spending 4-5 hours per essay. Now it takes me 20 minutes to get a polished first draft. I use the extra time to actually learn the material.
testimonials.quote3: The humanizer is insane. I ran my output through 3 different detectors — all came back as human-written. This tool is non-negotiable for me now.

cta.trigger1: Next time you're stuck on a problem —
cta.solution: Your future self will thank you.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: When you create an account, we collect your email address, name, and profile picture (if signing in with Google). When you use our services, we process the questions and text you submit to provide AI-generated responses.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our services. Your submitted questions are processed by AI models to generate responses and are not shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.title: 3. Data Storage
sections.content: Your account data is stored securely using Supabase (hosted on AWS). Payment information is processed and stored by Stripe — we never have access to your full card details.

sections.title: 4. Third-Party Services
sections.content: We use the following third-party services:
list: Google Gemini API — for AI-powered responses
Supabase — for authentication and data storage

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.content: You can request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us at support@axiom.study.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content: For questions about this privacy policy, contact us at support@axiom.study.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using Axiom, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
sections.content: Axiom is an AI-powered study companion that provides homework solutions, essay writing assistance, text humanization, and exam preparation tools. Responses are generated by AI and should be used as a learning aid, not submitted as your own work.

sections.title: 3. User Accounts
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must be at least 13 years old to use this service.

sections.title: 4. Subscription & Billing
sections.content: Pro subscriptions are billed at $19/month or $190/year. Elite subscriptions are billed at $49/month or $490/year. You can cancel at any time through the Settings page. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable Use
sections.content: You agree not to use Axiom for any illegal purposes, to harass others, or to attempt to circumvent rate limits or security measures.

sections.title: 6. Disclaimer
sections.content: AI-generated content may contain errors. Axiom is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for academic consequences resulting from the use of our service.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at support@axiom.study.
